assertions.title: Login page renders with SAE-A Trading branding

steps.observed: Login page displayed with title 'WCStubHub Clone - SAE-A Trading'
'SAE-A Trading' displayed prominently in blue/cyan gradient header with subtitle 'Sports Merchandise & Event Tickets'
Phone and Email tab buttons visible, Email tab active by default
Password input field with placeholder 'Enter your password' present
Login button visible with cyan/blue gradient background
'No account? Register now' text with clickable link visible

assertions.title: Phone/Email tab switching on login page

steps.observed: Phone Number input field displayed with placeholder 'Enter your phone number'
Phone tab text is blue with active underline indicator
Email Address input field displayed with placeholder 'Enter your email'

steps.expected: Only email input visible, not phone
steps.observed: Only Email Address input shown, Phone Number input hidden

assertions.title: Login form validation for empty fields

steps.action: Click Login with empty email and password
steps.observed: 'Email is required' error displayed in red text

steps.action: Fill email, leave password empty, click Login
steps.observed: 'Password is required' error displayed in red text
Page remained on /login, no network request observed

evidence.network: No network requests made during validation

steps.observed: Password field changed to type='text', 'testpass123' visible in plain text. Button label changed to 'Hide password'
Password field changed back to type='password', characters masked again. Button label reverted to 'Show password'

assertions.title: Language selector present and defaults to English

steps.action: Check for language selector on login page
steps.observed: Language combobox (select element) visible below the login form
is enabled = true, combobox is interactive

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Login page correctly renders SAE-A Trading branding, Phone/Email tab switching works with visual distinction, form validation shows inline errors for empty fields without network requests, password visibility toggle works bidirectionally, and language selector defaults to English and is interactive.
